search_strategy: Freshness over novelty. Repetition ALLOWED and ENCOURAGED — Mr. Lang needs up-to-the-day information on HS English/History teaching positions within ~30 miles of Edmonds for the 2026-2027 academic year. Re-report active listings daily. Prioritize new postings, updated closing dates, and any site-specific openings (vs. district pool notices).
standing_reminders: Mr. Lang's SPS interest card is miscategorized as Kitchen Assistant Manager rather than HS English — report as a standing reminder until fixed.
Mr. Lang started LWSD application 2026-04-15 — follow up on completion and submission status in subsequent briefings.
ongoing_narrative: Teaching jobs is a no-dedup sector — Mr. Lang needs fresh daily intelligence, and repetition of active listings is a feature. Spring 2026-27 hiring window is open. Mr. Lang started the Lake Washington School District application on April 15, 2026 — this is a positive development and subsequent briefings should check completion/submission status. Two new private-school listings surfaced today: Seattle Christian School HS Language Arts and King's Schools Shoreline. Districts to check daily: Edmonds, Shoreline, Mukilteo, Everett, Northshore, Lake Washington, Bellevue, SPS. Aggregators: Glassdoor (224-340 HS English positions in Seattle area), WEA district job pages, SchoolSpring, applitrack.com. Each run: verify SPS pool status, scan Edmonds SD applitrack, report NEW site-specific postings (not just district-pool notices), flag application-window closures, repeat the SPS miscategorization standing reminder, and follow up on LWSD application status.
